'''yasaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebra|zebra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebra|zebra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yasaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæsæjæth|yæsæjæth]] || [[word:yæsæjæj|yæsæjæj]] || [[word:yæsæjæsh|yæsæjæsh]] || [[word:yæsæjæ|yæsæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasasajath|yasasajath]] || [[word:yasasajaj|yasasajaj]] || [[word:yasasajash|yasasajash]] || [[word:yasasaja|yasasaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasajath|yasajath]] || [[word:yasajaj|yasajaj]] || [[word:yasajash|yasajash]] || [[word:yasaja|yasaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasafjath|yasafjath]] || [[word:yasafjaj|yasafjaj]] || [[word:yasafjash|yasafjash]] || [[word:yasafjaf|yasafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yasajatha|yasajatha]] || [[word:yasajaja|yasajaja]] || [[word:yasajasha|yasajasha]] || [[word:yasajaka|yasajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yasajath|yasajath]] || [[word:yasajaj|yasajaj]] || [[word:yasajash|yasajash]] || [[word:yasaja|yasaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yasajathal|yasajathal]] || [[word:yasajajal|yasajajal]] || [[word:yasajashal|yasajashal]] || [[word:yasajakal|yasajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yasajathatha|yasajathatha]] || [[word:yasajajaja|yasajajaja]] || [[word:yasajashasha|yasajashasha]] || [[word:yasajaka|yasajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yasajathan|yasajathan]] || [[word:yasajajan|yasajajan]] || [[word:yasajashan|yasajashan]] || [[word:yasajakan|yasajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yasajathaoro|yasajathaoro]] || [[word:yasajajaoro|yasajajaoro]] || [[word:yasajashaoro|yasajashaoro]] || [[word:yasajakaoro|yasajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
